channel.title: software on Technical Writing Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in software on Technical Writing Portfolio
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2008–2019, Steve Francia; all rights reserved. Content by Jeff Naemura.

item.title: Web-Based User Guide
item.description: This web document is based off a printed user guide for a 3D visualization system for ophthalmic surgery. I converted it to a web-based format to demonstrate potential topic organization and modularization in a responsive output format. Parts of this document are fictitious, removed, or redacted for proprietary purposes. My responsibilities for the original document included interpreting explanations from a Research and Development department acquired by the company, illustrating isometric and 2D drawings of individual system components and combined assemblies from CAD drawings, designing the visual styles based off the corporate brand guidelines and technical communication techniques, and creating the entire document.

item.title: Help File
item.description: The DXP Series help file is a web-based help file integrated into software. It includes context-sensitive links to relevant topics. My responsibilities were to create a single-source CSS file for multiple output types and collaborate with Research and Development to generate the help file within software sprint cycles. An actual copy of the help file is readily not available. Programs used: Madcap Flare Adobe Dreamweaver Adobe Photoshop The actual help file is not available for general public consumption, but the following screenshot shows the layout, styles, structure, and writing conventions used.
